accountType.description: The account type of the user, may return empty string if unavailable. App is if the user is a bot user created on behalf of an Atlassian app.

email.description: The email address of the user. Depending on the user's privacy setting, this may return an empty string.

publicName.description: The public name or nickname of the user. Will always contain a value.

displayName.description: The displays name of the user. Depending on the user's privacy setting, this may be the same as publicName.

timeZone.description: This displays user time zone. Depending on the user's privacy setting, this may return null.

isExternalCollaborator.description: Whether the user is an external collaborator user

externalCollaborator.description: Whether the user is an external collaborator user
